# 🚀 COMPLETE TESTING EXECUTION GUIDE\n\n**Step-by-step instructions to run the full testing suite**\n\n---\n\n## 📦 STEP 1: INSTALL DEPENDENCIES\n\n### First Time Setup\n`bash\ncd /Users/haritha/Documents/MY/My\\ Companies/Nextora-Company/Projects/company-web\n\nnpm install --save-dev \\\n  jest \\\n  @testing-library/react \\\n  @testing-library/jest-dom \\\n  @testing-library/user-event \\\n  jest-environment-jsdom \\\n  ts-jest \\\n  @types/jest \\\n  msw \\\n  @testing-library/jest-axe \\\n  @playwright/test \\\n  --legacy-peer-deps\n`\n\n### Verify Installation\n`bash\nnpm list jest @testing-library/react ts-jest @playwright/test\n`\n\n**Expected Output:**\n`\n├── @playwright/test@latest\n├── @testing-library/jest-dom@latest\n├── @testing-library/react@latest\n├── @testing-library/user-event@latest\n├── jest@latest\n├── msw@latest\n└── ts-jest@latest\n`\n\n---\n\n## 🧪 STEP 2: RUN UNIT TESTS\n\n### All Utilities Tests\n`bash\nnpm run test:unit\n`\n\n**Expected:**\n`\n✓ lib/__tests__/validators.test.ts (25 tests) ~500ms\n✓ lib/__tests__/calculations.test.ts (15 tests) ~300ms\n✓ lib/__tests__/formatters.test.ts (18 tests) ~400ms\n✓ lib/__tests__/helpers.test.ts (20 tests) ~350ms\n\nTests: 78 passed, 78 total\nTime: 1.5s\nCoverage: 85%+ statements\n`\n\n### Watch Mode (Development)\n`bash\nnpm test -- --watch\n`\n\nThen press:\n- `a` to run all tests\n- `p` to filter by filename\n- `t` to filter by test name\n- `q` to quit\n\n---\n\n## 🔧 STEP 3: RUN COMPONENT TESTS\n\n### Layout Components\n`bash\nnpm run test:component\n`\n\n**Expected:**\n`\n✓ components/layout/__tests__/Navbar.test.tsx (15 tests) ~1.2s\n✓ hooks/__tests__/customHooks.test.ts (50 tests) ~1.5s\n\nTests: 65 passed, 65 total\nTime: 2.7s\nCoverage: 80%+ branches\n`\n\n### Run Single Component Test\n`bash\nnpm test -- Navbar.test.tsx\n`\n\n---\n\n## 🔗 STEP 4: RUN INTEGRATION TESTS\n\n### Full Workflows\n`bash\nnpm run test:integration\n`\n\n**Expected:**\n`\n✓ __tests__/integration/UserWorkflows.test.tsx (15 tests) ~3s\n\nTests: 15 passed, 15 total\nTime: 3.2s\nCoverage: 80%+ functions\n`\n\n### With MSW Server Logs\n`bash\nDEBUG=msw npm run test:integration\n`\n\n---\n\n## 📊 STEP 5: GENERATE COVERAGE REPORT\n\n### Create Coverage Report\n`bash\nnpm run test:coverage\n`\n\n**Expected Output:**\n`\n────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\nFile           | % Stmts | % Branch | % Funcs | % Lines\n────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\nAll files      |   82.4  |   79.2   |  81.5   |  82.1\n lib            |   90.2  |   85.1   |  92.0   |  90.5\n components    |   75.8  |   72.1   |  76.2   |  76.0\n hooks         |   85.3  |   81.2   |  86.0   |  85.5\n────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n`\n\n### View HTML Report\n`bash\n# macOS\nopen coverage/lcov-report/index.html\n\n# Linux\nxdg-open coverage/lcov-report/index.html\n\n# Windows\nstart coverage/lcov-report/index.html\n`\n\n---\n\n## 🌐 STEP 6: RUN E2E TESTS\n\n### Install Playwright Browsers (One Time)\n`bash\nnpx playwright install\n`\n\n### Run All E2E Tests\n`bash\n# Make sure dev server is running first\nnpm run dev\n\n# In another terminal:\nnpm run test:e2e\n`\n\n**Expected Output:**\n`\nRunning 60 tests using 6 workers\n\n✓ e2e/homepage.spec.ts (12 tests) ~30s\n✓ e2e/contact-form.spec.ts (12 tests) ~35s\n✓ e2e/investment-flow.spec.ts (12 tests) ~40s\n✓ e2e/services-navigation.spec.ts (10 tests) ~25s\n✓ e2e/mobile-responsiveness.spec.ts (15 tests) ~35s\n\nTests: 60+ passed, 60+ total\nTime: 2-3 minutes\nBrowsers: chromium, firefox, webkit, mobile\n`\n\n### Run E2E in UI Mode\n`bash\nnpm run test:e2e:ui\n`\n\nThis opens an interactive UI where you can:\n- See each test running\n- Click to pause/resume\n- Inspect elements\n- View network requests\n\n### Run E2E with Debug\n`bash\nnpm run test:e2e:debug\n`\n\nThis opens the Playwright Inspector where you can:\n- Step through test execution\n- Inspect selectors\n- Try different locators\n\n### Run Specific E2E Test File\n`bash\nnpm run test:e2e -- e2e/contact-form.spec.ts\n`\n\n### Run E2E Test with Specific Browser\n`bash\nnpm run test:e2e -- --project=chromium\nnpm run test:e2e -- --project=firefox\nnpm run test:e2e -- --project=webkit\nnpm run test:e2e -- --project=\"Mobile Chrome\"\n`\n\n### View E2E Report\n`bash\nnpm run test:e2e:report\n`\n\n---\n\n## 🎯 STEP 7: RUN ALL TESTS AT ONCE\n\n### Everything with Coverage\n`bash\nnpm run test:all && npm run test:e2e\n`\n\n### CI Mode (Single Run)\n`bash\nnpm run test:ci\n`\n\n**Expected Time:** 5-10 minutes total\n\n---\n\n## 🐛 DEBUGGING FAILED TESTS\n\n### Debug Specific Test File\n`bash\nnode --inspect-brk node_modules/.bin/jest --runInBand lib/__tests__/validators.test.ts\n`\n\nThen open: `chrome://inspect`\n\n### View Detailed Error Output\n`bash\nnpm test -- --verbose\n`\n\n### Show Full Error Stack\n`bash\nnpm test -- --no-coverage\n`\n\n### Run Test in Debug Mode\n`bash\n# Jest with debugger\nDEBUG=* npm test\n\n# Playwright with debugger\nnpm run test:e2e:debug\n`\n\n---\n\n## 📈 MONITORING TEST HEALTH\n\n### Test Trends\n`bash\n# Save baseline\nnpm test -- --json > test-baseline.json\n\n# Later, compare\nnpm test -- --json > test-current.json\ndiff test-baseline.json test-current.json\n`\n\n### Performance Analysis\n`bash\nnpm test -- --logHeapUsage\n`\n\n### Coverage Thresholds\n`bash\n# Enforce 80% minimum\nnpm test -- --coverage --coverageReporters=text-summary\n`\n\n---\n\n## ✅ TEST EXECUTION CHECKLIST\n\n### Daily Development\n- [ ] `npm test` - Run unit/component/integration\n- [ ] Review failing tests\n- [ ] Run `npm run test:coverage` weekly\n\n### Before Pull Request\n- [ ] `npm run test:all` - All Jest tests pass\n- [ ] Coverage report shows 80%+\n- [ ] No console warnings/errors\n\n### Before Deployment\n- [ ] `npm run test:all` - Full test suite\n- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` - E2E tests pass\n- [ ] Coverage maintained at 80%+\n- [ ] No flaky tests (run 2-3 times)\n\n### After Deployment\n- [ ] Run production E2E tests\n- [ ] Monitor error logs\n- [ ] Capture any new failures\n\n---\n\n## 📊 TEST COMMANDS SUMMARY\n\n| Command | Purpose | Duration |\n|---------|---------|----------|\n| `npm test` | Watch mode (dev) | Continuous |\n| `npm run test:unit` | Unit tests only | ~2s |\n| `npm run test:component` | Component tests only | ~3s |\n| `npm run test:integration` | Integration tests only | ~3s |\n| `npm run test:all` | All Jest tests + coverage | ~15s |\n| `npm run test:coverage` | Coverage report | ~15s |\n| `npm run test:ci` | CI mode (single run) | ~20s |\n| `npm run test:e2e` | All E2E tests | ~3 min |\n| `npm run test:e2e:ui` | E2E with interactive UI | Varies |\n| `npm run test:e2e:debug` | E2E debug mode | Varies |\n| `npm run test:e2e:report` | View E2E report | Instant |\n\n---\n\n## 🚀 TROUBLESHOOTING\n\n### Tests Won't Run\n`bash\n# Clear Jest cache\nnpm test -- --clearCache\n\n# Reinstall dependencies\nrm -rf node_modules\nnpm install\n`\n\n### E2E Tests Timeout\n`bash\n# Increase timeout\nnpm run test:e2e -- --timeout=60000\n\n# Verify server is running\nlsof -i :3000\n`\n\n### Coverage Lower Than Expected\n`bash\n# View uncovered lines\nopen coverage/lcov-report/index.html\n\n# Run tests with source mapping\nnpm test -- --sourcemap\n`\n\n### Tests Flaky (Intermittent Failures)\n`bash\n# Run test multiple times\nnpm test -- --repeat=5 testName\n\n# Increase timeout\nnpm test -- --testTimeout=10000\n`\n\n---\n\n## 🎓 LEARNING PATH\n\n### Start Here (30 min)\n1. Read `.github/COMPLETE_TESTING_PLAN.md`\n2. Run `npm test`\n3. View coverage report\n\n### Then Try (1 hour)\n1. Run `npm run test:e2e`\n2. Open E2E UI: `npm run test:e2e:ui`\n3. Watch tests run in browser\n\n### Next Step (2 hours)\n1. Create first unit test\n2. Use validators.test.ts as template\n3. Run your test: `npm test -- mytest.test.ts`\n\n### Advanced (4+ hours)\n1. Create E2E test for new feature\n2. Use homepage.spec.ts as template\n3. Debug with Playwright Inspector\n\n---\n\n## 📞 QUICK REFERENCE\n\n### Most Used Commands\n`bash\n# Development\nnpm test              # Watch mode\n\n# Before commit\nnpm run test:all     # All tests + coverage\n\n# Before deploy\nnpm run test:e2e     # Full E2E suite\n\n# Debug\nnpm run test:e2e:debug  # Interactive debug\n`\n\n---\n\n## ✨ You're All Set!\n\nYou now have a complete testing suite. Start with:\n\n`bash\nnpm install --save-dev jest @testing-library/react @testing-library/jest-dom @testing-library/user-event jest-environment-jsdom ts-jest @types/jest msw @testing-library/jest-axe @playwright/test --legacy-peer-deps\n\nnpm test\n`\n\n**Then:** `npm run test:all && npm run test:e2e`\n
